name: Artisan
text: +1 Card. Gain a card to your hand costing up to $5. Put a card from your hand onto your deck.

name: Bandit
text: Gain a Gold. Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes a revealed Treasure other than Copper, and discards the rest.

name: Bureaucrat
text: Gain a Silver onto your deck. Each other player reveals a Victory card from their hand and puts it onto their deck (or reveals a hand with no Victory cards).

name: Cellar
text: +1 Action. Discard any number of cards, then draw that many.

name: Chapel
text: Trash up to 4 cards from your hand.

name: Council Room
text: +4 Cards. +1 Buy. Each other player draws a card.

name: Festival
text: +2 Actions. +1 Buy. +$2.

name: Gardens
text: Worth 1VP per 10 cards you have (rounded down).

name: Harbinger
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Look through your discard pile. You may put a card from it onto your deck.

name: Laboratory
text: +2 Cards. +1 Action.

name: Library
text: Draw until you have 7 cards in hand, skipping any Action cards you choose to; set those aside, discarding them afterwards.

name: Market
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +1 Buy. +$1.

name: Merchant
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. The first time you play a Silver this turn, +$1.

name: Militia
text: +$2. Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand.

name: Mine
text: You may trash a Treasure from your hand. Gain a Treasure to your hand costing up to $3 more than it.

name: Moat
text: +2 Cards. When another player plays an Attack card, you may first reveal this from your hand, to be unaffected by it.

name: Moneylender
text: You may trash a Copper from your hand for +$3.

name: Poacher
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +$1. Discard a card per empty Supply pile.

name: Remodel
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing up to $2 more than it.

name: Sentry
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Trash and/or discard any number of them. Put the rest back on top in any order.

name: Smithy
text: +3 Cards.

name: Throne Room
text: You may play an Action card from your hand twice.

name: Vassal
text: +$2. Discard the top card of your deck. If it's an Action card, you may play it.

name: Village
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions.

name: Witch
text: +2 Cards. Each other player gains a Curse.

name: Workshop
text: Gain a card costing up to $4.

name: Baron
text: +1 Buy. You may discard an Estate for +$4. If you don't, gain an Estate.

name: Bridge
text: This turn, cards cost $1 less (but not less than $0). +1 Buy. +$1.

name: Conspirator
text: +$2. If you've played 3 or more Actions this turn (counting this): +1 Card, +1 Action.

name: Courtier
text: Reveal a card from your hand. For each type it has, choose one (must be different): +1 Action; +1 Buy; +$3; gain a Gold.

name: Courtyard
text: +3 Cards. Put a card from your hand onto your deck.

name: Diplomat
text: +2 Cards. If you have 5 or fewer cards in hand (after drawing): +2 Actions. When another player plays an Attack, you may reveal this (if you have ≥5 cards in hand) to draw 2 cards then discard 3.

name: Duke
text: Worth 1VP per Duchy you have.

name: Ironworks
text: Gain a card costing up to $4. If the gained card is an Action: +1 Action. Treasure: +$1. Victory: +1 Card.

name: Lurker
text: +1 Action. Choose one: Trash an Action card from the Supply; or gain an Action card from the Trash.

name: Masquerade
text: +2 Cards. Each player with any cards in hand passes one to the next such player to their left, at once. Then you may trash a card from your hand.

name: Mill
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. You may discard 2 cards for +$2. (1VP)

name: Mining Village
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. You may trash this card immediately for +$2.

name: Minion
text: +1 Action. Choose one: +$2; or discard your hand, +4 Cards, and each other player with 5+ cards in hand discards their hand and draws 4 cards.

name: Nobles
text: Choose one: +3 Cards; or +2 Actions. (2VP)

name: Patrol
text: +3 Cards. Reveal the top 4 cards of your deck. Put the Victory cards and Curses into your hand. Put the rest back on your deck in any order.

name: Pawn
text: Choose two different options: +1 Card; +1 Action; +1 Buy; +$1.

name: Replace
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing up to $2 more than it. If the gained card is an Action or Treasure, put it onto your deck; if it is a Victory card, each other player gains a Curse.

name: Secret Passage
text: +2 Cards. +1 Action. Take a card from your hand and put it anywhere in your deck.

name: Shanty Town
text: +2 Actions. Reveal your hand. If you have no Action cards in hand, +2 Cards.

name: Steward
text: Choose one: +2 Cards; or +$2; or trash 2 cards from your hand.

name: Swindler
text: +$2. Each other player trashes the top card of their deck and gains a card of the same cost that you choose.

name: Torturer
text: +3 Cards. Each other player either discards 2 cards or gains a Curse to their hand, their choice. They may pick an option they cannot do.

name: Trading Post
text: Trash 2 cards from your hand. If you did, gain a Silver to your hand.

name: Upgrade
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing exactly $1 more than it.

name: Wishing Well
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Name a card, then reveal the top card of your deck. If it's the named card, put it into your hand.

name: Astrolabe
text: Now and at the start of your next turn: +$1, +1 Buy.

name: Bazaar
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. +$1.

name: Blockade
text: Gain a card costing up to $4, setting it aside. At the start of your next turn, put it into your hand. While it's set aside, when another player gains a copy of it on their turn, they gain a Curse.

name: Caravan
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. At the start of your next turn, +1 Card.

name: Corsair
text: +$2. At the start of your next turn, +1 Card. Until then, each other player trashes the first Silver or Gold they play each turn.

name: Cutpurse
text: +$2. Each other player discards a Copper from their hand (or reveals a hand with no Copper).

name: Fishing Village
text: +2 Actions. +$1. At the start of your next turn: +1 Action, +$1.

name: Haven
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Set aside a card from your hand face down. At the start of your next turn, put it into your hand.

name: Island
text: Put this and a card from your hand onto your Island mat. 2VP.

name: Lighthouse
text: +1 Action. +$1. At the start of your next turn, +$1. While this is in play, when another player plays an Attack card, it doesn't affect you.

name: Lookout
text: +1 Action. Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. Trash one of them, discard one of them, and put the other back on top.

name: Merchant Ship
text: +$2. At the start of your next turn, +$2.

name: Monkey
text: Until your next turn, when the player to your right gains a card, +1 Card. At the start of your next turn, +1 Card.

name: Native Village
text: +2 Actions. Choose one: Put the top card of your deck face down on your Native Village mat (you may look at those cards at any time); or put all the cards from your mat into your hand.

name: Outpost
text: You only draw 3 cards for your next hand. Take an extra turn after this one (but not a 3rd turn in a row).

name: Pirate
text: At the start of your next turn, gain a Treasure costing up to $6 to your hand. When any player gains a Treasure, you may play this from your hand.

name: Sailor
text: +1 Action. Once this turn, when you gain a Duration card, you may play it. At the start of your next turn, +$2 and you may trash a card from your hand.

name: Salvager
text: +1 Buy. Trash a card from your hand. +$ equal to its cost.

name: Sea Chart
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Reveal the top card of your deck. If you have a copy of it in play, put it into your hand.

name: Sea Witch
text: +2 Cards. Each other player gains a Curse. At the start of your next turn, +2 Cards, then discard 2 cards.

name: Smugglers
text: Gain a copy of a card costing up to $6 that the player to your right gained on their last turn.

name: Tactician
text: If you have at least one card in hand: Discard your hand, and at the start of your next turn, +5 Cards, +1 Action, and +1 Buy.

name: Tide Pools
text: +3 Cards. +1 Action. At the start of your next turn, discard 2 cards.

name: Treasure Map
text: Trash this and a copy of Treasure Map from your hand. If you trashed two Treasure Maps, gain 4 Golds to your deck.

name: Treasury
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +$1. At the end of your Buy phase this turn, if you didn't gain a Victory card in it, you may put this onto your deck.

name: Warehouse
text: +3 Cards. +1 Action. Discard 3 cards.

name: Wharf
text: Now and at the start of your next turn: +2 Cards and +1 Buy.

name: Alchemist
text: +2 Cards. +1 Action. When you discard this from play, if you have a Potion in play, you may put this onto your deck.

name: Apothecary
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Reveal the top 4 cards of your deck. Put the revealed Coppers and Potions into your hand. Put the rest back in any order.

name: Apprentice
text: +1 Action. Trash a card from your hand. +1 Card per $1 it costs. +2 Cards if it has Potion in its cost.

name: Familiar
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Each other player gains a Curse.

name: Golem
text: Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal 2 Action cards other than Golems. Discard the other cards, then play the Action cards in either order.

name: Herbalist
text: +1 Buy. +$1. When you discard this from play, you may put one of your Treasures from play onto your deck.

name: Philosopher's Stone
text: When you play this, count your deck and discard pile. +$1 per 5 cards total between them (rounded down).

name: Possession
text: The player to your left takes an extra turn after this one (but not a 2nd extra turn in a row), in which you can see all cards they can and make all decisions for them. Any cards or Debt they would gain on that turn, you gain instead; any cards of theirs that are trashed are set aside and put in their discard pile at end of turn.

name: Scrying Pool
text: +1 Action. Each player (including you) reveals the top card of their deck and either discards it or puts it back, your choice. Then reveal cards from your deck until revealing one that is not an Action. Put all of those revealed cards into your hand.

name: Transmute
text: Trash a card from your hand. If it is an Action card, gain a Duchy. If it is a Treasure card, gain a Transmute. If it is a Victory card, gain a Gold.

name: University
text: +2 Actions. You may gain an Action card costing up to $5.

name: Vineyard
text: Worth 1VP per 3 Action cards you have (rounded down).

name: Anvil
text: +$1. You may discard a Treasure to gain a card costing up to $4.

name: Watchtower
text: Draw until you have 6 cards in hand. When you gain a card, you may reveal this from your hand; if you do, either trash that card or put it onto your deck.

name: Bishop
text: +$1. +1VP. Trash a card from your hand. +VP equal to half its cost in coins, rounded down. Each other player may trash a card from their hand.

name: Clerk
text: +$2. Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand puts one onto their deck. At the start of your turn, you may play this from your hand.

name: Investment
text: Trash a card from your hand. Choose one: +$1; or trash this to reveal your hand for +1VP per differently named Treasure there.

name: Quarry
text: +$1. While this is in play, Action cards cost $2 less, but not less than $0.

name: Tiara
text: +1 Buy. This turn, when you gain a card, you may put it onto your deck. You may play a Treasure from your hand twice.

name: Worker's Village
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. +1 Buy.

name: City
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. If there are one or more empty Supply piles, +1 Card. If there are two or more, +1 Buy and +$1.

name: Collection
text: +$2. +1 Buy. This turn, when you gain an Action card, +1VP.

name: Crystal Ball
text: +$1. Look at the top card of your deck. You may trash it, discard it, or, if it is an Action or Treasure, play it.

name: Magnate
text: Reveal your hand. +1 Card per Treasure in your hand.

name: Mint
text: You may reveal a Treasure from your hand. Gain a copy of it. When you gain this, trash all non-Duration Treasures you have in play.

name: Rabble
text: +3 Cards. Each other player reveals the top 3 cards of their deck, discards the Actions and Treasures, and puts the rest back in any order.

name: Vault
text: +2 Cards. Discard any number of cards. +$1 per card discarded. Each other player may discard 2 cards; if they do, they draw a card.

name: War Chest
text: The player to your left names a card. Gain a card costing up to $5 that has not been named for War Chests this turn.

name: Charlatan
text: +$3. Each other player gains a Curse. In games using this, Curses are also Treasure cards worth $1.

name: Grand Market
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +1 Buy. +$2. You can't buy this if you have any Copper in play.

name: Hoard
text: +$2. This turn, when you gain a Victory card, if you bought it, gain a Gold.

name: Bank
text: +$X, where X is the number of Treasures you have in play, counting this.

name: Expand
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing up to $3 more than it.

name: Forge
text: Trash any number of cards from your hand. Gain a card with cost exactly equal to the total cost in coins of the trashed cards.

name: King's Court
text: You may play an Action card from your hand three times.

name: Peddler
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +$1. During your Buy phase, this costs $2 less per Action card you have in play, but not less than $0.

name: Advisor
text: +1 Action. Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. The player to your left chooses one of them. Discard that card and put the rest into your hand.

name: Baker
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +1 Coffers. Setup: Each player gets +1 Coffers.

name: Butcher
text: +2 Coffers. You may trash a card from your hand, to gain a card, costing up to $1 more than it per Coffers you spend.

name: Candlestick Maker
text: +1 Action. +1 Buy. +1 Coffers.

name: Carnival
text: Reveal the top 4 cards of your deck. Put one of each differently named card into your hand and discard the rest.

name: Fairgrounds
text: Worth 2VP per 5 differently named cards you have (round down).

name: Farmhands
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. When you gain this, you may set aside an Action or Treasure from your hand, and play it at the start of your next turn.

name: Farrier
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +1 Buy. Overpay: +1 Card at the end of this turn per $1 overpaid.

name: Ferryman
text: +2 Cards. +1 Action. Discard a card. Setup: Choose an unused Kingdom card pile costing $3 or $4. When you gain this, gain one of those cards.

name: Footpad
text: +2 Coffers. Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand. In games using this, when you gain a card in an Action phase, +1 Card.

name: Hamlet
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. You may discard a card for +1 Action. You may discard a card for +1 Buy.

name: Herald
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Reveal the top card of your deck. If it is an Action, play it. Overpay: Per $1 overpaid, put any card from your discard pile onto your deck.

name: Horn of Plenty
text: Gain a card costing up to $1 per differently named card you have in play (counting this). If it is a Victory card, trash this.

name: Hunting Party
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Reveal your hand. Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal a card that is not a copy of one in your hand. Put it into your hand and discard the rest.

name: Infirmary
text: +1 Card. You may trash a card from your hand. Overpay: Play this once per $1 overpaid.

name: Jester
text: Each other player discards the top card of their deck. If it is a Victory card they gain a Curse; otherwise they gain a copy of the discarded card or you do, your choice.

name: Journeyman
text: Name a card. Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal 3 cards without that name. Put those cards into your hand and discard the rest.

name: Joust
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +$2. You may set aside a Province from your hand to gain any Reward to your hand. Discard the Province in Clean-up.

name: Menagerie
text: +1 Action. Reveal your hand. If the revealed cards all have different names, +3 Cards. Otherwise, +1 Card.

name: Merchant Guild
text: +1 Buy. +$1. At the end of your Buy phase this turn, +1 Coffers per card you gained in it.

name: Plaza
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. You may discard a Treasure for +1 Coffers.

name: Remake
text: Do this twice: Trash a card from your hand, then gain a card costing exactly $1 more than it.

name: Shop
text: +1 Card. +$1. You may play an Action card from your hand that you do not have a copy of in play.

name: Soothsayer
text: Gain a Gold. Each other player gains a Curse, and if they did, draws a card.

name: Stonemason
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain 2 cards each costing less than it. Overpay: Gain 2 Action cards each costing the amount overpaid.

name: Young Witch
text: +2 Cards. Discard 2 cards. Each other player gains a Curse unless they reveal a Bane from their hand. Setup: Add an extra Kingdom card pile costing $2 or $3 to the Supply. Its cards are Banes.

name: Coronet
text: You may play a non-Reward Action from your hand twice. You may play a non-Reward Treasure from your hand twice. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Courser
text: Choose two different options: +2 Cards; +2 Actions; +$2; gain 4 Silvers. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Demesne
text: +2 Actions. +2 Buys. Gain a Gold. Worth 1VP per Gold you have. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Housecarl
text: +1 Card per differently named Action card you have in play. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Huge Turnip
text: +2 Coffers. +$1 per Coffers you have. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Renown
text: +1 Buy. This turn, cards cost $2 less. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Berserker
text: Gain a card costing less than this. Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand. When you gain this, if you have an Action card in play, play this.

name: Border Village
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. When you gain this, gain a cheaper card.

name: Cartographer
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Discard any number of them. Put the rest back in any order.

name: Cauldron
text: +$2. +1 Buy. This turn, when you gain your 3rd Action card, each other player gains a Curse.

name: Crossroads
text: Reveal your hand. +1 Card per Victory card revealed. If this is the first time you played Crossroads this turn, +3 Actions.

name: Develop
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain 2 cards, one costing exactly $1 more than it, and one costing exactly $1 less than it, in either order, putting them onto your deck.

name: Fool's Gold
text: The first time you play a Fool's Gold this turn, this is worth $1; otherwise, it's worth $4. When another player gains a Province, you may trash this from your hand to gain a Gold onto your deck.

name: Farmland
text: 2VP. When you gain this, trash a card from your hand. If you do, gain a card costing exactly $2 more than it, except a Farmland.

name: Guard Dog
text: +2 Cards. If you have 5 or fewer cards in hand, +2 Cards. When another player plays an Attack card, you may first play this from your hand.

name: Haggler
text: +$2. This turn, when you gain a card, if you bought it, gain a cheaper non-Victory card.

name: Highway
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. While this is in play, cards cost $1 less, but not less than $0.

name: Inn
text: +2 Cards. +2 Actions. Discard 2 cards. When you gain this, look through your discard pile (including this), reveal any number of Action cards from it, and shuffle them into your deck.

name: Jack of All Trades
text: Gain a Silver. Look at the top card of your deck; discard it or put it back. Draw until you have 5 cards in hand. You may trash a non-Treasure card from your hand.

name: Margrave
text: +3 Cards. +1 Buy. Each other player draws a card, then discards down to 3 cards in hand.

name: Nomads
text: +$2. When you gain or trash this, +$2.

name: Oasis
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +$1. Discard a card.

name: Scheme
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. At the start of Clean-up this turn, you may choose an Action card you have in play to put onto your deck.

name: Souk
text: +1 Buy. +$7. -$1 per card in your hand. When you gain this, trash up to 2 cards from your hand.

name: Spice Merchant
text: You may trash a Treasure from your hand. If you do, choose one: +2 Cards, +1 Action; or +$2, +1 Buy.

name: Stables
text: You may discard a Treasure. If you do, +3 Cards, +1 Action.

name: Trader
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a Silver per $1 it costs. When you would gain a card, you may reveal this from your hand to gain a Silver instead.

name: Trail
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. When you gain, trash, or discard this, other than during Clean-up, you may play it.

name: Tunnel
text: 2VP. When you discard this, other than during Clean-up, you may reveal it. If you do, gain a Gold.

name: Weaver
text: Choose one: Gain 2 Silvers; or gain a card costing up to $4. When you discard this, other than during Clean-up, you may play it.

name: Wheelwright
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. You may discard a card to gain an Action card costing as much as it or less.

name: Witch's Hut
text: +4 Cards. Discard 2 cards. If they're both Actions, each other player gains a Curse.

name: Page
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. When you discard this from play, you may exchange it for a Treasure Hunter.

name: Peasant
text: +1 Buy. +$1. When you discard this from play, you may exchange it for a Soldier.

name: Ratcatcher
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Put this on your Tavern mat. At the start of your turn, you may call this, to trash a card from your hand.

name: Raze
text: +1 Action. Trash this or a card from your hand. Look at one card from the top of your deck per $1 the trashed card costs. Put one into your hand and discard the rest.

name: Coin of the Realm
text: +$1. Put this on your Tavern mat. After you play an Action card, you may call this, for +2 Actions.

name: Amulet
text: Now and at the start of your next turn, choose one: +$1; or trash a card from your hand; or gain a Silver.

name: Caravan Guard
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. At the start of your next turn, +$1. When another player plays an Attack card, you may first play this from your hand.

name: Dungeon
text: +1 Action. Now and at the start of your next turn: +2 Cards, then discard 2 cards.

name: Gear
text: +2 Cards. Set aside up to 2 cards from your hand face down (under this). At the start of your next turn, put them into your hand.

name: Guide
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Put this on your Tavern mat. At the start of your turn, you may call this, to discard your hand and draw 5 cards.

name: Duplicate
text: Put this on your Tavern mat. When you gain a card costing up to $6, you may call this, to gain a copy of that card.

name: Magpie
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Reveal the top card of your deck. If it is a Treasure, put it into your hand. If it is an Action or Victory card, gain a Magpie.

name: Messenger
text: +1 Buy. +$2. You may put your deck into your discard pile. When this is the first card you gain in your Buy phase, gain a card costing up to $4, and each other player gains a copy of it.

name: Miser
text: Choose one: Put a Copper from your hand onto your Tavern mat; or +$1 per Copper on your Tavern mat.

name: Port
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. When you gain this, gain another Port (that doesn't come with another).

name: Ranger
text: +1 Buy. Turn your Journey token over (it starts face up). Then if it is face up, +5 Cards.

name: Transmogrify
text: +1 Action. Put this on your Tavern mat. At the start of your turn, you may call this, to trash a card from your hand, and gain a card to your hand costing up to $1 more than it.

name: Artificer
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +$1. Discard any number of cards. You may gain a card onto your deck, costing exactly $1 per card discarded.

name: Bridge Troll
text: Each other player takes their -$1 token. On this turn and your next turn, cards cost $1 less. Now and at the start of your next turn: +1 Buy.

name: Distant Lands
text: Put this on your Tavern mat. Worth 4 VP if on your Tavern mat at the end of the game (otherwise worth 0 VP).

name: Giant
text: Turn your Journey token over (it starts face up). Then if it is face down, +$1. If it is face up, +$5, and each other player reveals the top card of their deck, trashes it if it costs from $3 to $6, and otherwise discards it and gains a Curse.

name: Haunted Woods
text: Until your next turn, when any other player gains a card they bought, they put their hand onto their deck in any order. At the start of your next turn, +3 Cards.

name: Lost City
text: +2 Cards. +2 Actions. When you gain this, each other player draws a card.

name: Relic
text: +$2. When you play this, each other player puts their -1 Card token on their deck.

name: Royal Carriage
text: +1 Action. Put this on your Tavern mat. Directly after resolving an Action card, if it is still in play, you may call this, to replay that Action.

name: Storyteller
text: +1 Action. Play up to 3 Treasures from your hand. Then, +1 Card, and pay all of your $ for +1 Card per $ you paid.

name: Swamp Hag
text: Until your next turn, when any other player gains a card they bought, they gain a Curse. At the start of your next turn, +$3.

name: Treasure Trove
text: +$2. When you play this, gain a Gold and a Copper.

name: Wine Merchant
text: +1 Buy. +$4. Put this on your Tavern mat. At the end of your Buy phase, if you have at least $2 unspent, you may discard this from your Tavern mat.

name: Hireling
text: At the start of each of your turns for the rest of the game: +1 Card. (This stays in play.)

name: Alms
text: Once per turn: If you have no Treasures in play, gain a card costing up to $4.

name: Borrow
text: Once per turn: +1 Buy. If your -1 Card token isn't on your deck, put it there and +$1.

name: Quest
text: You may discard an Attack, two Curses, or six cards. If you do, gain a Gold.

name: Save
text: Once per turn: +1 Buy. Set aside a card from your hand, and put it into your hand at end of turn (after drawing).

name: Scouting Party
text: +1 Buy. Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. Discard 3 and put the rest back in any order.

name: Travelling Fair
text: +2 Buys. When you gain a card this turn, you may put it onto your deck.

name: Bonfire
text: Trash up to 2 Coppers you have in play.

name: Expedition
text: Draw 2 extra cards for your next hand.

name: Ferry
text: Move your -$2 cost token to an Action Supply pile. (Cards from that pile cost $2 less on your turns, but not less than $0.)

name: Plan
text: Move your Trashing token to an Action Supply pile. (When you gain a card from that pile, you may trash a card from your hand.)

name: Mission
text: Once per turn: If the previous turn wasn't yours, take another turn after this one, during which you can't buy cards (you can still buy Events).

name: Pilgrimage
text: Once per turn: Turn your Journey token over (it starts face up); then if it's face up, choose up to 3 differently named cards you have in play and gain a copy of each.

name: Ball
text: Take your -$1 token. Gain 2 cards each costing up to $4.

name: Raid
text: Gain a Silver per Silver you have in play. Each other player puts their -1 Card token on their deck.

name: Seaway
text: Gain an Action card costing up to $4. Move your +1 Buy token to its pile. (When you play a card from that pile, you first get +1 Buy.)

name: Trade
text: Trash up to 2 cards from your hand. Gain a Silver per card you trashed.

name: Lost Arts
text: Move your +1 Action token to an Action Supply pile. (When you play a card from that pile, you first get +1 Action.)

name: Training
text: Move your +$1 token to an Action Supply pile. (When you play a card from that pile, you first get +$1.)

name: Inheritance
text: Once per game: Set aside a non-Command Action card from the Supply costing up to $4. Move your Estate token to it. (During your turns, Estates are also Command Actions with "Play the card with your Estate token, leaving it there.")

name: Pathfinding
text: Move your +1 Card token to an Action Supply pile. (When you play a card from that pile, you first get +1 Card.)

name: Treasure Hunter
text: +1 Action. +$1. Gain a Silver per card the player to your right gained in their last turn. When you discard this from play, you may exchange it for a Warrior.

name: Warrior
text: +2 Cards. For each Traveller you have in play (including this), each other player discards the top card of their deck and trashes it if it costs $3 or $4. When you discard this from play, you may exchange it for a Hero.

name: Hero
text: +$2. Gain a Treasure. When you discard this from play, you may exchange it for a Champion.

name: Champion
text: +1 Action. For the rest of the game, when another player plays an Attack, it doesn't affect you, and when you play an Action card, +1 Action. (This stays in play.)

name: Soldier
text: +$2. +$1 per other Attack you have in play. Each other player with 4 or more cards in hand discards a card. When you discard this from play, you may exchange it for a Fugitive.

name: Fugitive
text: +2 Cards. +1 Action. Discard a card. When you discard this from play, you may exchange it for a Disciple.

name: Disciple
text: You may play an Action card from your hand twice. Gain a copy of it. When you discard this from play, you may exchange it for a Teacher.

name: Teacher
text: Put this on your Tavern mat. At the start of your turn, you may call this, to move your +1 Card, +1 Action, +1 Buy, or +$1 token to an Action Supply pile you have no tokens on.

name: Acting Troupe
text: +4 Villagers. Trash this.

name: Border Guard
text: +1 Action. Reveal the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and discard the other. If both were Actions, take the Lantern or Horn.

name: Cargo Ship
text: +$2. Once this turn, when you gain a card, you may set it aside face up (on this). At the start of your next turn, put it into your hand.

name: Ducat
text: +1 Coffers. +1 Buy. When you gain this, you may trash a Copper from your hand.

name: Experiment
text: +2 Cards. +1 Action. Return this to the Supply. When you gain this, gain another Experiment (that does not come with another).

name: Flag Bearer
text: +$2. When you gain or trash this, take the Flag.

name: Hideout
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. Trash a card from your hand. If it is a Victory card, gain a Curse.

name: Improve
text: +$2. At the start of Clean-up, you may trash an Action card you would discard from play this turn, to gain a card costing exactly $1 more than it.

name: Inventor
text: Gain a card costing up to $4, then cards cost $1 less this turn.

name: Lackeys
text: +2 Cards. When you gain this, +2 Villagers.

name: Mountain Village
text: +2 Actions. Look through your discard pile and put a card from it into your hand; if you cannot, +1 Card.

name: Old Witch
text: +3 Cards. Each other player gains a Curse and may trash a Curse from their hand.

name: Patron
text: +1 Villager. +$2. When something causes you to reveal this (using the word "reveal"), +1 Coffers.

name: Priest
text: +$2. Trash a card from your hand. For the rest of this turn, when you trash a card, +$2.

name: Recruiter
text: +2 Cards. Trash a card from your hand. +1 Villager per $1 it costs.

name: Research
text: +1 Action. Trash a card from your hand. Per $1 it costs, set aside a card from your deck face down (on this). At the start of your next turn, put those cards into your hand.

name: Scepter
text: +$2; or replay an Action card you played this turn that is still in play.

name: Scholar
text: Discard your hand. +7 Cards.

name: Sculptor
text: Gain a card to your hand costing up to $4. If it is a Treasure, +1 Villager.

name: Seer
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Put the ones costing from $2 to $4 into your hand. Put the rest back in any order.

name: Silk Merchant
text: +2 Cards. +1 Buy. When you gain or trash this, +1 Coffers and +1 Villager.

name: Spices
text: +$2. +1 Buy. When you gain this, +2 Coffers.

name: Swashbuckler
text: +3 Cards. If your discard pile has any cards in it: +1 Coffers, then if you have at least 4 Coffers tokens, take the Treasure Chest.

name: Treasurer
text: +$3. Choose one: Trash a Treasure from your hand; or gain a Treasure from the trash to your hand; or take the Key.

name: Villain
text: +2 Coffers. Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand discards one costing $2 or more (or reveals they can't).

name: Cathedral
text: At the start of your turn, trash a card from your hand.

name: City Gate
text: At the start of your turn, +1 Card, then put a card from your hand onto your deck.

name: Pageant
text: At the end of your Buy phase, you may pay $1 for +1 Coffers.

name: Sewers
text: When you trash a card other than with this, you may trash a card from your hand.

name: Star Chart
text: When shuffling, you may pick one of the cards to go on top.

name: Exploration
text: At the end of your Buy phase, if you didn't buy any cards during it, +1 Coffers and +1 Villager.

name: Fair
text: At the start of your turn, +1 Buy.

name: Silos
text: At the start of your turn, discard any number of Coppers, revealed, and draw that many cards.

name: Sinister Plot
text: At the start of your turn, add a token here, or remove your tokens here for +1 Card each.

name: Academy
text: When you gain an Action card, +1 Villager.

name: Capitalism
text: During your turns, Actions with +$ amounts in their text are also Treasures.

name: Fleet
text: After the game ends, there is an extra round of turns just for players with this.

name: Guildhall
text: When you gain a Treasure, +1 Coffers.

name: Piazza
text: At the start of your turn, reveal the top card of your deck. If it's an Action, play it.

name: Road Network
text: When another player gains a Victory card, +1 Card.

name: Barracks
text: At the start of your turn, +1 Action.

name: Crop Rotation
text: At the start of your turn, you may discard a Victory card for +2 Cards.

name: Innovation
text: The first time you gain an Action card during each of your turns, you may play it.

name: Canal
text: During your turns, cards cost $1 less.

name: Citadel
text: The first time you play an Action card during each of your turns, play it twice instead.

name: Flag
text: When drawing your hand, +1 Card. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Horn
text: Once per turn, when you discard a Border Guard from play, you may put it onto your deck. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Key
text: At the start of your turn, +$1. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Lantern
text: Border Guards you play reveal 3 cards and discard 2. It takes all 3 being Actions to take the Horn. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Treasure Chest
text: At the start of your Buy phase, gain a Gold. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Altar
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing up to $5.

name: Armory
text: Gain a card onto your deck costing up to $4.

name: Band of Misfits
text: Play a non-Command Action card from the Supply costing less than this, leaving it there.

name: Bandit Camp
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. Gain a Spoils.

name: Beggar
text: Gain 3 Coppers to your hand. When another player plays an Attack card, you may first discard this to gain 2 Silvers, putting one onto your deck.

name: Catacombs
text: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. Choose one: Put them into your hand; or discard them and +3 Cards. When you trash this, gain a cheaper card.

name: Count
text: Choose one: Discard 2 cards; or put a card from your hand onto your deck; or gain a Copper. Choose one: +$3; or trash your hand; or gain a Duchy.

name: Counterfeit
text: Worth $1. When you play this, you may play a Treasure from your hand twice. Trash that Treasure. +1 Buy.

name: Cultist
text: +2 Cards. Each other player gains a Ruins. You may play a Cultist from your hand. When you trash this, +3 Cards.

name: Death Cart
text: You may trash this or an Action card from your hand, for +$5. When you gain this, gain 2 Ruins.

name: Feodum
text: Worth 1VP per 3 Silvers you have (rounded down). When you trash this, gain 3 Silvers.

name: Forager
text: +1 Action. +1 Buy. Trash a card from your hand. +$1 per differently named Treasure in the trash.

name: Fortress
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. When you trash this, put it into your hand.

name: Graverobber
text: Choose one: Gain a card from the trash costing from $3 to $6, putting it on top of your deck; or trash an Action card from your hand and gain a card costing up to $3 more than it.

name: Hermit
text: Look through your discard pile. You may trash a non-Treasure card from your discard pile or hand. Gain a card costing up to $3. When you discard this from play, if you didn't buy any cards this turn, exchange this for a Madman.

name: Hunting Grounds
text: +4 Cards. When you trash this, gain a Duchy or 3 Estates.

name: Ironmonger
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Reveal the top card of your deck; you may discard it. Either way, if it's an Action, +1 Action; if it's a Treasure, +$1; if it's a Victory card, +1 Card.

name: Junk Dealer
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +$1. Trash a card from your hand.

name: Knights
text: A split pile of 10 different Knight cards. Each Knight: Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one costing from $3 to $6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash the attacking Knight too.

name: Dame Anna
text: +2 Cards. Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing $3 to $6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.

name: Dame Josephine
text: 2VP. Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing $3 to $6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.

name: Dame Molly
text: +2 Actions. Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing $3 to $6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.

name: Dame Natalie
text: You may gain a card costing up to $3. Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing $3 to $6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.

name: Dame Sylvia
text: +$2. Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing $3 to $6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.

name: Sir Bailey
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing $3 to $6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.

name: Sir Destry
text: +2 Cards. Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing $3 to $6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.

name: Sir Martin
text: +2 Buys. Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing $3 to $6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.

name: Sir Michael
text: Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand. Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing $3 to $6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.

name: Sir Vander
text: Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing $3 to $6, and discards the rest. When you trash this, gain a Gold. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.

name: Marauder
text: Gain a Spoils. Each other player gains a Ruins.

name: Market Square
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +1 Buy. When one of your cards is trashed, you may discard this from your hand to gain a Gold.

name: Madman
text: +2 Actions. Return this to the Madman pile. If you do, +1 Card per card in your hand.

name: Mercenary
text: You may trash 2 cards from your hand. If you do, +2 Cards, +$2, and each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand.

name: Mystic
text: +1 Action. +$2. Name a card, then reveal the top card of your deck. If it's the named card, put it into your hand.

name: Pillage
text: Trash this. Gain 2 Spoils. Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand reveals their hand and discards a card that you choose.

name: Poor House
text: +$4. Reveal your hand. -$1 per Treasure card in your hand.

name: Procession
text: You may play an Action card from your hand twice. Trash it. Gain an Action card costing exactly $1 more.

name: Rats
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Gain a Rats. Trash a card from your hand other than a Rats (or reveal a hand of all Rats). When you trash this, +1 Card.

name: Rebuild
text: +1 Action. Name a card. Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal a Victory card that isn't the named card. Discard the rest. Trash it and gain a Victory card costing up to $3 more.

name: Rogue
text: +$2. If there are any cards in the trash costing from $3 to $6, gain one. Otherwise, each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one costing from $3 to $6, and discards the rest.

name: Sage
text: Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal one costing $3 or more. Put that card into your hand and discard the rest. +1 Action.

name: Scavenger
text: +$2. You may put your deck into your discard pile. Look through your discard pile and put a card from it on top of your deck.

name: Squire
text: +$1. Choose one: +2 Actions; or +2 Buys; or gain a Silver. When you trash this, gain an Attack card.

name: Storeroom
text: +1 Buy. Discard any number of cards, +$1 per card discarded. Then discard any number of cards and draw that many.

name: Urchin
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Each other player discards down to 4 cards in hand. When you play another Attack card with this in play, you may trash this to gain a Mercenary.

name: Vagrant
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's a Curse, Ruins, Shelter, or Victory card, put it into your hand.

name: Wandering Minstrel
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck; put the Action cards back in any order and discard the rest.

name: Archive
text: +1 Action. Set aside the top 3 cards of your deck face down (you may look at them). Now and at the start of your next two turns, put one into your hand.

name: Capital
text: +$6. +1 Buy. When you discard this from play, take 6 Debt, and then you may pay off Debt.

name: Castles
text: Sort the Castle pile by cost, putting the more expensive Castles on the bottom. For a 2-player game, use only one of each Castle. Only the top card of the pile can be gained or bought.

name: Catapult
text: +$1. Trash a card from your hand. If it costs $3 or more, each other player gains a Curse. If it is a Treasure, each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand.

name: Rocks
text: +$1. When you gain or trash this: If it's your Buy phase, gain a Silver onto your deck, otherwise gain a Silver to your hand.

name: Chariot Race
text: +1 Action. Reveal the top card of your deck and put it into your hand. The player to your left reveals the top card of their deck. If your card costs less, +$1 and +1VP.

name: Charm
text: Choose one: +1 Buy and +$2; or the next time you gain a card this turn, you may also gain a differently named card with the same cost.

name: City Quarter
text: +2 Actions. Reveal your hand. +1 Card per Action card revealed.

name: Crown
text: If it is your Action phase, you may play an Action from your hand twice. If it is your Buy phase, you may play a Treasure from your hand twice.

name: Encampment
text: +2 Cards. +2 Actions. You may reveal a Gold or Plunder from your hand. If you do not, set this aside, and return it to its pile at the start of Clean-up.

name: Enchantress
text: Until your next turn, the first time each other player plays an Action card on their turn, they get +1 Card and +1 Action instead of following its instructions. At the start of your next turn, +2 Cards.

name: Engineer
text: Gain a card costing up to $4. You may trash this. If you do, gain a card costing up to $4.

name: Farmers' Market
text: +1 Buy. If there are 4VP or more on the Farmers' Market Supply pile, take them and trash this. Otherwise, add 1VP to the pile and then +$1 per VP on the pile.

name: Patrician
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Reveal the top card of your deck. If it costs $5 or more, put it into your hand.

name: Emporium
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +$1. When you gain this, if you have at least 5 Action cards in play, +2VP.

name: Forum
text: +3 Cards. +1 Action. Discard 2 cards. When you buy this, +1 Buy.

name: Gladiator
text: +$2. Reveal a card from your hand. The player to your left may reveal a copy from their hand. If they do not, +$1 and trash a Gladiator from the Supply.

name: Fortune
text: +1 Buy. When you play this, double your $ if you have not yet this turn. When you gain this, gain a Gold per Gladiator you have in play.

name: Groundskeeper
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. This turn, when you gain a Victory card, +1VP.

name: Legionary
text: +$3. You may reveal a Gold from your hand. If you do, each other player discards down to 2 cards in hand, then draws a card.

name: Overlord
text: Play a non-Command non-Duration Action card from the Supply costing up to $5, leaving it there.

name: Royal Blacksmith
text: +5 Cards. Reveal your hand; discard the Coppers.

name: Sacrifice
text: Trash a card from your hand. If it is an Action card, +2 Cards and +2 Actions. If it is a Treasure, +$2. If it is a Victory card, +2VP.

name: Settlers
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Look through your discard pile. You may reveal a Copper from it and put it into your hand.

name: Bustling Village
text: +1 Card. +3 Actions. Look through your discard pile. You may reveal a Settlers from it and put it into your hand.

name: Temple
text: +1VP. Trash from 1 to 3 differently named cards from your hand. Add 1VP to the Temple Supply pile. When you gain this, take all the VP from the Temple Supply pile.

name: Villa
text: +2 Actions. +1 Buy. +$1. When you gain this, put it into your hand, +1 Action, and if it is your Buy phase, return to your Action phase.

name: Wild Hunt
text: Choose one: +3 Cards and add 1VP to the Wild Hunt Supply pile; or gain an Estate, and if you do, take the VP from the pile.

name: Advance
text: You may trash an Action card from your hand. If you do, gain an Action card costing up to $6.

name: Annex
text: Look through your discard pile. Shuffle all but up to 5 cards from it into your deck. Gain a Duchy.

name: Banquet
text: Gain 2 Coppers and a non-Victory card costing up to $5.

name: Conquest
text: Gain 2 Silvers. +1VP per Silver you have gained this turn.

name: Delve
text: +1 Buy. Gain a Silver.

name: Dominate
text: Gain a Province. If you do, +9VP.

name: Donate
text: After this turn, put all cards from your deck and discard pile into your hand, trash any number of cards from it, then shuffle the rest into your deck.

name: Ritual
text: Gain a Curse. If you do, trash a card from your hand and +1VP per $1 it costs.

name: Salt the Earth
text: +1VP. Trash a Victory card from the Supply.

name: Tax
text: Add 2 Debt to a Supply pile. Setup: Add 1 Debt to each Supply pile. When a player gains a card in their Buy phase, they take the Debt from its pile.

name: Triumph
text: Gain an Estate. If you do, +1VP per card you have gained this turn.

name: Wedding
text: +1VP. Gain a Gold.

name: Windfall
text: If your deck and discard pile are empty, gain 3 Golds.

name: Aqueduct
text: When you gain a Treasure, move 1VP from its pile to this. When you gain a Victory card, take the VP from this. Setup: Put 8VP on the Silver and Gold piles.

name: Arena
text: At the start of your Buy phase, you may discard an Action card. If you do, take 2VP from here. Setup: Put 6VP here per player.

name: Bandit Fort
text: When scoring, -2VP for each Silver and each Gold you have.

name: Basilica
text: When you buy a card, if you have $2 or more left, take 2VP from here. Setup: Put 6VP here per player.

name: Baths
text: When you end your turn without having gained a card, take 2VP from here. Setup: Put 6VP here per player.

name: Battlefield
text: When you gain a Victory card, take 2VP from here. Setup: Put 6VP here per player.

name: Colonnade
text: When you buy an Action card, if you have a copy of it in play, take 2VP from here. Setup: Put 6VP here per player.

name: Defiled Shrine
text: When you gain an Action, move 1VP from its pile to this. When you buy a Curse, take the VP from this. Setup: Put 2VP on each non-Gathering Action Supply pile.

name: Fountain
text: When scoring, 15VP if you have at least 10 Coppers.

name: Keep
text: When scoring, 5VP per differently named Treasure you have, that you have more copies of than each other player, or tied for most.

name: Labyrinth
text: When you gain a 2nd card in one of your turns, take 2VP from here. Setup: Put 6VP here per player.

name: Mountain Pass
text: When you are the first player to gain a Province, after that turn, each player bids once, up to 40 Debt, ending with you. High bidder gets +8VP and takes the Debt they bid.

name: Museum
text: When scoring, 2VP per differently named card you have.

name: Obelisk
text: When scoring, 2VP per card you have from the chosen pile. Setup: Choose a random Action Supply pile.

name: Orchard
text: When scoring, 4VP per differently named Action card you have 3 or more copies of.

name: Palace
text: When scoring, 3VP per set you have of Copper, Silver, and Gold.

name: Tomb
text: When you trash a card, +1VP.

name: Tower
text: When scoring, 1VP per non-Victory card you have from an empty Supply pile.

name: Triumphal Arch
text: When scoring, 3VP per copy you have of the 2nd most common Action card among your cards (if it's a tie, count either).

name: Wall
text: When scoring, -1VP per card you have after the first 15.

name: Wolf Den
text: When scoring, -3VP per card you have exactly one copy of.

name: Humble Castle
text: +$1. Worth 1VP per Castle you have. (This is part of the Castles pile.)

name: Crumbling Castle
text: 1VP. When you gain or trash this, +1VP and gain a Silver. (This is part of the Castles pile.)

name: Small Castle
text: 2VP. Trash this or a Castle from your hand. If you do, gain a Castle. (This is part of the Castles pile.)

name: Haunted Castle
text: 2VP. When you gain this during your turn, gain a Gold, and each other player with 5 or more cards in hand puts 2 cards from their hand onto their deck. (This is part of the Castles pile.)

name: Opulent Castle
text: 3VP. Discard any number of Victory cards. +$2 per card discarded. (This is part of the Castles pile.)

name: Sprawling Castle
text: 4VP. When you gain this, gain a Duchy or 3 Estates. (This is part of the Castles pile.)

name: Grand Castle
text: 5VP. When you gain this, reveal your hand. +1VP per Victory card in your hand and/or in play. (This is part of the Castles pile.)

name: King's Castle
text: Worth 2VP per Castle you have. (This is part of the Castles pile.)

name: Animal Fair
text: +$4. +1 Buy per empty Supply pile. Instead of paying this card's cost, you may trash an Action card from your hand.

name: Barge
text: Either now or at the start of your next turn, +3 Cards and +1 Buy.

name: Black Cat
text: +2 Cards. If it isn't your turn, each other player gains a Curse. When another player gains a Victory card, you may play this from your hand.

name: Bounty Hunter
text: +1 Action. Exile a card from your hand. If you didn't have a copy of it in Exile, +$3.

name: Camel Train
text: Exile a non-Victory card from the Supply. When you gain this, Exile a Gold from the Supply.

name: Cardinal
text: +$2. Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, Exiles one costing from $3 to $6, and discards the rest.

name: Cavalry
text: +2 Cards. +1 Buy. Gain 2 Horses. When you gain this, +2 Cards, +1 Buy, and if it's your Buy phase return to your Action phase.

name: Coven
text: +1 Action. +$2. Each other player Exiles a Curse from the Supply. If they cannot, they discard their Exiled Curses.

name: Destrier
text: +2 Cards. +1 Action. During your turns, this costs $1 less per card you've gained this turn.

name: Displace
text: Exile a card from your hand. Gain a differently named card costing up to $2 more than it.

name: Falconer
text: Gain a card to your hand costing less than this. When any player gains a card with 2 or more types, you may play this from your hand.

name: Fisherman
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +$1. During your turns, if your discard pile is empty, this costs $3 less.

name: Gatekeeper
text: At the start of your next turn, +$3. Until then, when another player gains an Action or Treasure card they do not have an Exiled copy of, they Exile it.

name: Goatherd
text: +1 Action. You may trash a card from your hand. +1 Card per card the player to your right trashed on their last turn.

name: Groom
text: Gain a card costing up to $4. If it is an Action card, gain a Horse. If it is a Treasure card, gain a Silver. If it is a Victory card, +1 Card and +1 Action.

name: Hostelry
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. When you gain this, you may discard any number of Treasures, revealed, to gain that many Horses.

name: Hunting Lodge
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. You may discard your hand for +5 Cards.

name: Kiln
text: +$2. The next time you play a card this turn, you may first gain a copy of it.

name: Livery
text: +$3. This turn, when you gain a card costing $4 or more, gain a Horse.

name: Mastermind
text: At the start of your next turn, you may play an Action card from your hand three times.

name: Paddock
text: +$2. +2 Actions. Gain 2 Horses. +1 Action per empty Supply pile.

name: Sanctuary

text: Each other player gains a Curse. At the start of your next turn, draw until you have 8 cards in hand. When you gain this, trash it unless you trash an Action from your hand.

name: Stowaway
text: At the start of your next turn, +2 Cards. When anyone gains a Duration card, you may play this from your hand.

name: Swamp Shacks
text: +2 Actions. +1 Card per 3 cards you have in play (round down).

name: Taskmaster
text: +1 Action. +$1. If you gain a card costing exactly $5 this turn, then at the start of your next turn, repeat this ability.

name: Tools
text: Gain a copy of a card anyone has in play.

name: Trickster
text: Each other player gains a Curse. Once this turn, when you discard a Treasure from play, you may set it aside. Put it in your hand at end of turn.

name: Wealthy Village
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. When you gain this, if you have at least 3 differently named Treasures in play, gain a Loot.

name: Avoid
text: +1 Buy. The next time you shuffle this turn, pick up to 3 of those cards to put into your discard pile.

name: Bury
text: +1 Buy. Put any card from your discard pile on the bottom of your deck.

name: Deliver
text: +1 Buy. This turn, each time you gain a card, set it aside, and put it into your hand at end of turn.

name: Foray
text: Discard 3 cards, revealing them. If they have 3 different names, gain a Loot.

name: Invasion
text: You may play an Attack from your hand. Gain a Duchy. Gain an Action onto your deck. Gain a Loot; play it.

name: Journey
text: You don't discard cards from play in Clean-up this turn. Take an extra turn after this one (but not a 3rd turn in a row).

name: Launch
text: Once per turn: Return to your Action phase. +1 Card, +1 Action, and +1 Buy.

name: Looting
text: Gain a Loot.

name: Maelstrom
text: Trash 3 cards from your hand. Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand trashes one of them.

name: Mirror
text: +1 Buy. The next time you gain an Action card this turn, gain a copy of it.

name: Peril
text: You may trash an Action card from your hand to gain a Loot.

name: Prepare
text: Set aside your hand face up. At the start of your next turn, play those Actions and Treasures in any order, then discard the rest.

name: Prosper
text: Gain a Loot, plus any number of differently named Treasures.

name: Rush
text: +1 Buy. The next time you gain an Action card this turn, play it.

name: Scrounge
text: Choose one: Trash a card from your hand; or gain an Estate from the trash, and if you did, gain a card costing up to $5.

name: Cheap
text: Cheap cards cost $1 less.

name: Cursed
text: When you gain a Cursed card, gain a Loot and a Curse.

name: Fated
text: When shuffling, you may look through the cards and reveal Fated cards to put them on the top or bottom.

name: Fawning
text: When you gain a Province, gain a Fawning card.

name: Friendly
text: At the start of your Clean-up phase, you may discard a Friendly card to gain a Friendly card.

name: Hasty
text: When you gain a Hasty card, set it aside, and play it at the start of your next turn.

name: Inherited
text: Setup: You start the game with an Inherited card in place of a starting card you choose.

name: Inspiring
text: After playing an Inspiring card on your turn, you may play an Action from your hand that you don't have a copy of in play.

name: Nearby
text: When you gain a Nearby card, +1 Buy.

name: Patient
text: At the start of your Clean-up phase, you may set aside Patient cards from your hand, to play them at the start of your next turn.

name: Pious
text: When you gain a Pious card, you may trash a card from your hand.

name: Reckless
text: Follow the instructions of played Reckless cards twice. When discarding one from play, return it to its pile.

name: Rich
text: When you gain a Rich card, gain a Silver.

name: Shy
text: At the start of your turn, you may discard one Shy card for +2 Cards.

name: Tireless
text: When you discard a Tireless card from play, set it aside, and put it onto your deck at end of turn.

name: Amphora
text: Either now or at the start of your next turn: +1 Buy and +$3.

name: Doubloons
text: +$3. When you gain this, gain a Gold.

name: Endless Chalice
text: Now and at the start of each of your turns for the rest of the game: +$1. +1 Buy.

name: Figurehead
text: +$3. At the start of your next turn, +2 Cards.

name: Hammer
text: +$3. Gain a card costing up to $4.

name: Insignia
text: +$3. This turn, when you gain a card, you may put it onto your deck.

name: Jewels
text: +$3. +1 Buy. At the start of your next turn, put this on the bottom of your deck.

name: Orb
text: Look through your discard pile. Choose one: Play an Action or Treasure from it; or +1 Buy and +$3.

name: Prize Goat
text: +$3. +1 Buy. You may trash a card from your hand.

name: Puzzle Box
text: +$3. +1 Buy. You may set aside a card from your hand face down. Put it into your hand at end of turn.

name: Sextant
text: +$3. +1 Buy. Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. Discard any number. Put the rest back in any order.

name: Shield
text: +$3. +1 Buy. When another player plays an Attack, you may first reveal this from your hand to be unaffected.

name: Spell Scroll
text: Trash this to gain a cheaper card. If it's an Action or Treasure, you may play it.

name: Staff
text: +$3. +1 Buy. You may play an Action from your hand.

name: Sword
text: +$3. +1 Buy. Each other player discards down to 4 cards in hand.

name: Alley
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Discard a card. You can play this from your deck as if in your hand.

name: Aristocrat
text: If the number of Aristocrats you have in play is: 1 or 5: +3 Actions; 2 or 6: +3 Cards; 3 or 7: +$3; 4 or 8: +3 Buys.

name: Artist
text: +1 Action. +1 Card per card you have exactly one copy of in play.

name: Change
text: If you have any Debt, +$3. Otherwise, trash a card from your hand, and gain a card costing more $ than it. +Debt equal to the difference in $.

name: Craftsman
text: +2 Debt. Gain a card costing up to $5.

name: Daimyo
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. The next time you play a non-Command Action card this turn, replay it afterwards.

name: Fishmonger
text: +1 Buy. +$1. You can play this from your deck as if in your hand.

name: Gold Mine
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +1 Buy. You may gain a Gold and get +4 Debt.

name: Imperial Envoy
text: +5 Cards. +1 Buy. +2 Debt.

name: Kitsune
text: +1 Sun. Choose two different options: +2 Actions; +$2; each other player gains a Curse; gain a Silver.

name: Litter
text: +2 Cards. +2 Actions. +1 Debt.

name: Mountain Shrine
text: +1 Sun. +$2. You may trash a card from your hand. Then if there are any Action cards in the trash, +2 Cards.

name: Ninja
text: +1 Card. Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand. You can play this from your deck as if in your hand.

name: Poet
text: +1 Sun. +1 Card. +1 Action. Reveal the top card of your deck. If it costs $3 or less, put it into your hand.

name: Rice
text: +1 Buy. +$1 per different type among cards you have in play.

name: Rice Broker
text: +1 Action. Trash a card from your hand. If it's a Treasure, +2 Cards. If it's an Action, +5 Cards.

name: River Shrine
text: +1 Sun. Trash up to 2 cards from your hand. At the start of Clean-up, if you didn't gain any cards in your Buy phase this turn, gain a card costing up to $4.

name: Riverboat
text: At the start of your next turn, play the set-aside card, leaving it there. Setup: Set aside an unused non-Duration Action card costing $5.

name: Ronin
text: Draw until you have 7 cards in hand. You can play this from your deck as if in your hand.

name: Root Cellar
text: +3 Cards. +1 Action. +3 Debt.

name: Rustic Village
text: +1 Sun. +1 Card. +2 Actions. You may discard 2 cards for +1 Card.

name: Samurai
text: Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand (once). At the start of each of your turns this game, +$1. (This stays in play.)

name: Snake Witch
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. If your hand has no duplicate cards, you may reveal it and return this to its pile, to have each other player gain a Curse.

name: Tanuki
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing up to $2 more than it. You can play this from your deck as if in your hand.

name: Tea House
text: +1 Sun. +1 Card. +1 Action. +$2.

name: Amass
text: If you have no Action cards in play, gain an Action card costing up to $5.

name: Asceticism
text: Pay any amount of $ to trash that many cards from your hand.

name: Continue
text: Once per turn: Gain a non-Attack Action card costing up to $4. Return to your Action phase and play it. +1 Action and +1 Buy.

name: Credit
text: Gain an Action or Treasure costing up to $8. +Debt equal to its cost.

name: Foresight
text: Reveal cards from your deck until revealing an Action. Set it aside and discard the rest. Put it into your hand at end of turn.

name: Gather
text: Gain a card costing exactly $3, a card costing exactly $4, and a card costing exactly $5.

name: Kintsugi
text: Trash a card from your hand. If you've gained a Gold this game, gain a card costing up to $2 more than the trashed card.

name: Practice
text: You may play an Action card from your hand twice.

name: Receive Tribute
text: If you've gained at least 3 cards this turn, gain up to 3 differently named Action cards you don't have copies of in play.

name: Sea Trade
text: +1 Card per Action card you have in play. Trash up to that many cards from your hand.

name: Approaching Army
text: After you play an Attack card, +$1. Setup: Add an Attack kingdom card pile to the Supply.

name: Biding Time
text: At the start of your Clean-up, set aside your hand face down. At the start of your next turn, put those cards into your hand.

name: Bureaucracy
text: When you gain a card that doesn't cost $0, gain a Copper.

name: Divine Wind
text: When you remove the last Sun, remove all Kingdom card piles from the Supply, and set up 10 new random piles.

name: Enlightenment
text: Treasures are also Actions. When you play a Treasure in an Action phase, instead of following its instructions, +1 Card and +1 Action.

name: Flourishing Trade
text: Cards cost $1 less. You may use Action plays as Buys.

name: Good Harvest
text: The first time you play each differently named Treasure each turn, first, +1 Buy and +$1.

name: Great Leader
text: After each Action card you play, +1 Action.

name: Growth
text: When you gain a Treasure, gain a cheaper card.

name: Harsh Winter
text: When you gain a card on your turn, if there's Debt on its pile, take it; otherwise put 2 Debt on its pile.

name: Kind Emperor
text: At the start of your turn, and when you remove the last Sun: Gain an Action to your hand.

name: Panic
text: When you play a Treasure, +2 Buys, and when you discard one from play, return it to its pile.

name: Progress
text: When you gain a card, put it onto your deck.

name: Rapid Expansion
text: When you gain an Action or Treasure, set it aside, and play it at the start of your next turn.

name: Sickness
text: At the start of your turn, choose one: Gain a Curse onto your deck; or discard 3 cards.
